description: Hold and reconcile the dispensed lactose monohydrate for AZC-26-0603-A against the pressure excursion window, then document QA material disposition.
linkedRootCause: Supply air damper actuator response was slow after preventive maintenance because the PM check did not include a pressure recovery challenge under dispensing-door open conditions.
verificationMethod: QA hold record and material impact assessment

description: Repair or replace the WGH-01 supply air damper actuator and run a documented pressure recovery challenge before releasing the room for dispensing.
linkedRootCause: Supply air damper actuator response was slow after preventive maintenance because the PM check did not include a pressure recovery challenge under dispensing-door open conditions.
verificationMethod: Engineering response test and QA review of pressure trend

description: Assign and complete SOP-WH-030 retraining for the two missed warehouse operators, including documented competency checks before independent cold-chain picking resumes.
linkedRootCause: Q100+ SOP revision workflow allowed a saved training group to be reused without reconciling the current warehouse role matrix, so two active cold-chain picking operators were missed.
verificationMethod: Training completion record and competency check review

description: Review dispatch records handled by the two operators after the SOP effective date and document whether any cold-chain picking error occurred.
linkedRootCause: Q100+ SOP revision workflow allowed a saved training group to be reused without reconciling the current warehouse role matrix, so two active cold-chain picking operators were missed.

description: Inspect the returned complaint vial, retained samples, and warehouse stock for lot CSI-26-0509-A for crimp edge lift, stopper seating, and leakage indicators.
